name: Parmesan, Herb and Anchovy
steps: Vac the two together and cook at 60C for 8 hours.
Pass and reserve in the fridge.
Blitz Parmesan to a fine crumb.
Bring the milk to the boil and pour over the cheese.
Add the xanthan and the oil; allow to blend with cold egg whites.
Once cooled add gelatin and pass.
Carefully remove the fillets from the bones.
Vac the bones at 90C and transfer to a pan.
Pick the biggest leaves and toast on the yakitori.
Once toasted dry at 55C for 8 hours.
